title: SY11 4LP, David and Lucy Woollam: environmental permit issued – EPR/KP3122LH/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: David and Lucy Woollam Installation name: Land to the West of Bryn y Plentyn Farm Permit number: EPR/KP3122LH/A001  "
